output.$starlark:
normalized = [score / 100.0 for score in output]
sum_scores = sum(normalized)
[score / sum_scores for score in normalized] if sum_scores > 0 else [1.0 / len(normalized)] * len(normalized)

input_merge.$starlark: [photo for subarray in input for photo in subarray]

description: The rank-cat-composition function evaluates and ranks cat photographs by compositional excellence. It assesses artistic intentionality, visual harmony, subject prominence, and contextual support to identify photos with thoughtful, purposeful composition. This enables photographers and curators to recognize exemplary photographic craftsmanship.

input_schema.description: An array of cat photos to be ranked

items.description: A cat photo with its URL and optional metadata

url.description: The URL or file path to the cat photo image

title.description: An optional title or label for the photo

photographer.description: An optional credit to the photographer
